name: Auto-Scheduler â€” Assign Publish Times to Approved Posts

nodes.name: Every 30 Minutes
nodes.notes:
RESPONSIBILITY: n8n (NERVOUS SYSTEM)
Check for approved-but-unscheduled posts and assign publish times

parameters.query: SELECT cq.id, cq.platform, cq.upload_id FROM content_queue cq WHERE cq.status = 'approved' AND cq.scheduled_at IS NULL ORDER BY cq.approved_at ASC LIMIT 20

nodes.name: Get Unscheduled Approved Posts
nodes.notes: Find posts that are approved but don't have a publish time yet

parameters.query: SELECT pc.platform, pc.posts_per_day, pc.interval_hours, pc.best_times, COALESCE(MAX(cq.scheduled_at), MAX(cq.published_at), NOW()) as last_scheduled FROM platform_config pc LEFT JOIN content_queue cq ON cq.platform = pc.platform AND cq.status IN ('scheduled', 'publishing') WHERE pc.enabled = true GROUP BY pc.platform, pc.posts_per_day, pc.interval_hours, pc.best_times

nodes.name: Get Platform Schedules
nodes.notes:
Get posting intervals and last scheduled time per platform
Used to calculate next available slot

nodes.name: Calculate Publish Slots
nodes.notes:
RESPONSIBILITY: n8n (NERVOUS SYSTEM)
Algorithm: take interval_hours, find last scheduled time,
calculate next available slot. No AI needed â€” pure math.

parameters.query: UPDATE content_queue SET status = 'scheduled', scheduled_at = '{{ $json.scheduled_at }}' WHERE id = {{ $json.id }} AND status = 'approved'

nodes.name: Assign Schedule to Posts
nodes.notes: Mark posts as scheduled with their calculated publish time
